aspected by Jupiter. The aspect is good because Jupiter is a
natural benefic and bad as Jupiter is a malefic for Aquarius
Lagna. The fourth house is fairly strong.
Matrukaraka (Lord of Mother).—The Moon owns the
6th and hence afflicted. Matrukaraka's association with
Saturn here gives rise to considerable affliction though
there is a little relief due to Jupiter's aspect. Above all, the
karaka for the mother in the appropriate bhava is not a
happy combination.
The Fourth Lord.—The. lord of the fourth Venus is in
the 4th from the bhava in association with two malefics
Mars and Mercury and hemmed in between the Sun and
Ketu. In the Navamsa also the fourth lord Venus is
considerably afflicted on account of the aspect of Mars.
Considered from the Moon.—The fourth lord Sun is in
the twelfth from the fourth subjected to the aspects of
Saturn and Jupiter, the latter being evil by virtue of the
eighth and eleventh lordship from Chandra Lagna. The
